blockers.title: Active minors can re-add mentorship through the profile surface
blockers.evidence: The under-18 decision blocks minors from the mentorship program, and Stage 0 says the server-side lane evaluator must enforce restricted actions. The join form strips mentor options for minors, but once a guardian-confirmed minor is active, updateProfile only checks lifecycle_state === "active" (convex/members.ts:186-190). validateProfileFields accepts every LOOKING_FOR value, including "Mentorship (as mentee)" and "Offer mentorship (as mentor)" (convex/lib/profile.ts:126-132, 210-213), and ProfileEditor renders those options without a lane check (src/portal/ProfileEditor.tsx:378-385).
blockers.required_fix: Apply the minor lane rule in updateProfile and the profile UI: refuse or strip mentorship looking_for values for member_lane === "minor", and add a Convex regression test with an active minor attempting to save mentorship options.

blockers.title: Name sentence rejection is still bypassable
blockers.evidence: Spec criterion 2 requires pasted sentences to be rejected. isValidNamePart allows up to 3 words and only rejects a small stop-word list (convex/lib/names.ts:20-41); the comment explicitly admits a 3-word phrase can still slip through (convex/lib/names.ts:7-13). A sentence-like value such as "aviation opens doors" satisfies the regex, word-count, length, and stop-word checks and would be stored after title-casing.
blockers.required_fix: Tighten the server-side name validator so sentence-shaped three-word inputs are rejected, while preserving the named particle cases in the spec. Add regression tests for non-stop-word sentence payloads, not only "please join me".

non_blocking_notes: npm test and npm run check could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vite/Astro attempted to write node_modules/.vite-temp and .astro/content.d.ts. Full build/E2E were therefore not verified here.
No secrets found in the diff scan. Targeted em-dash search found only the documented Arabic org-name en dash cases and non-member-facing SOURCE-MAP punctuation.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Gender field Female / Male, Female pre-selected, no Woman/Ally labels
spec_compliance.evidence: JoinApp renders Gender with exactly Female and Male radios, and Female is the initial state (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:395-421).

spec_compliance.criterion: 2. First name + Last name validation and Title Case
spec_compliance.evidence: Split fields and title casing exist, but the server validator still permits some sentence-shaped 3-word inputs (convex/lib/names.ts:7-41).

spec_compliance.criterion: 3. Email normalization, disposable rejection, duplicate route without second record/email
spec_compliance.evidence: normalizeEmail/isValidJoinEmail trim/lowercase and deny listed domains; duplicate createPendingMember returns sign_in before insert, and JoinApp does not call signIn on already=true.

spec_compliance.criterion: 4. Country fixed single-select stored to country_of_residence
spec_compliance.evidence: Client uses COUNTRIES, server validates with isValidCountry, and createPendingMember stores country_of_residence (convex/members.ts:283-285, 411).

spec_compliance.criterion: 5. Looking-for multi-select from LOOKING_FOR stored to looking_for
spec_compliance.evidence: Join submit validates LOOKING_FOR values and stores looking_for; minors have mentor options stripped at join (convex/members.ts:286-287, 337-348, 412).
Under-13 refusal and pending guardian capture exist, but minor-lane safeguarding is incomplete after activation because active minors can save mentorship looking_for values through updateProfile.
The checkbox text matches the required sentence and submitJoin rejects missing attestation (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:504-515; convex/members.ts:269-272).

spec_compliance.criterion: 8. Certificate-name confirm step before account creation
spec_compliance.evidence: Confirm stage displays the title-cased fullName and submitJoin is only called from that confirmation stage; Edit returns to the form (src/portal/JoinApp.tsx:164-244).
Terms are required, marketing and pipeline default false, and createPendingMember inserts all three consent rows with non-standard lanes forced false for pipeline (convex/members.ts:452-466).
Turnstile, honeypot, and join rate limits are implemented, but the server-side name validation still allows sentence-shaped bypasses.

spec_compliance.criterion: 11. Em-dash cleanup in targeted member-visible strings
spec_compliance.evidence: No U+2014/U+2013 found in src/portal/*.tsx; remaining hits are documented Arabic org-name cases or non-target metadata.

spec_compliance.criterion: 12. BRAND-4 HowToJoin confirm-token comment does not ship in built HTML
spec_compliance.evidence: The HTML comment was replaced with Astro/frontmatter comments in src/components/membership/HowToJoin.astro; build output could not be regenerated in read-only mode.

spec_compliance.criterion: 13. SOURCE-MAP current for /join, /portal, /verify, and Arabic routes
spec_compliance.evidence: SOURCE-MAP.md adds rows for Join, Portal, Certificate verify, and the Arabic route set.
Tests cover many join paths, but there is no regression for active minors re-adding mentorship through updateProfile or for non-stop-word sentence names.
No extra product behavior beyond the join-form compliance/security gating work was found in the reviewed diff.

summary: DO-NOT-SHIP. The main join path is much closer, but there is still a real minor-safeguarding gap in the profile path and a remaining name-validation bypass against an explicit acceptance criterion.
